painAgitateSolution.title: The Problem
painAgitateSolution.description: Most AI tutorials show what tools do — not how to create viral videos, grow an audience, or scale a business. Creators who ignore AI are getting left behind.

painAgitateSolution.title: The Shift
painAgitateSolution.description: AI won't replace creators — but creators who leverage AI will replace the ones who don't. The tools finally caught up. Now you need the strategy.

painAgitateSolution.title: The System
painAgitateSolution.description: 6 phases: filmmaking tools → growth content → graphics → thumbnails → scripting → studio & editing. No expensive subscriptions required.

after: Confident using the best AI tools the easy way

testimonials.name: Jordan
testimonials.text: I went from spending a week on one YouTube video to publishing 3× more content that actually performs. The AI ad module alone changed how I run campaigns.

testimonials.name: Priya
testimonials.text: The thumbnail and short-form sections are gold. My first AI-made Reel hit 500K views. No expensive gear — just the system from this course.

testimonials.name: Marcus
testimonials.text: I was skeptical about AI until this course. Character consistency and clone workflows saved me hours every week. Worth every dollar.

faqItems.question: Do I need to know anything about AI to take this course?
faqItems.answer: No experience needed. We start from the ground up and show you the best tools the easy way — no technical background required.

faqItems.question: What makes this different from free YouTube tutorials?
faqItems.answer: Most free content is outdated or generic. This course shows you how to actually use AI for viral videos, growth, ads, and business — with step-by-step workflows tested on real channels.

faqItems.question: How long will it take me to complete the entire course?
faqItems.answer: The core program is designed as a 2-day intensive, but you have lifetime access. Go at your own pace and revisit modules anytime.

faqItems.question: Will I need expensive software or gear?
faqItems.answer: No. We focus on tools that work without expensive monthly subscriptions. A phone and a blank wall are enough to get started.

faqItems.question: Is this course only for YouTubers?
faqItems.answer: No. It's for anyone creating content — TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, ads, short films, or building a personal brand or business online.

faqItems.question: Do I get lifetime access to the course?
faqItems.answer: Yes. One payment, lifetime access including future updates and new modules we add to the program.

faqItems.question: Is there a guarantee?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, email us for a full refund — no questions asked.
